leadText: The Safety Goggles (Japanese: ぼうじんゴーグル Dustproof Goggles) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It grants the holder immunity to powder and spore moves and damage from weather.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Grants the holder immunity to powder and spore moves and to damage from hail and sandstorm . It also blocks the activation of the Ability Effect Spore .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. These goggles protect the holder from both weather-related damage and powder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. These goggles protect the holder from both sandstorm damage and the effects of powders and spores.
